Document:
# Core Rule 2 - No ERP
Erotic roleplay (ERP) is strictly prohibited. This includes explicit sexual content, implied sexual acts, sexually suggestive behavior, or roleplay intended to arouse, sexualize, or create sexual tension between characters.
Content that may reasonably be interpreted as sexual by unwilling participants is not permitted. “It was a joke” or “it was in-character” is not an acceptable defense. Sexual harassment, persistent sexual comments, unwanted advances, sexual coercion, or fetish-oriented behavior are not allowed under any circumstances. Creepy or sexually charged behavior that targets other players, makes others uncomfortable, or creates an unsafe environment will be treated as a violation of this rule, even if it is subtle or indirect. This applies to all in-game communication, character actions, written materials, and server platforms.
## [color=#dd3535][bold]There are no exceptions to this rule.[/bold][/color]
